overall.description: A third-person game scene depicting a character wading through a foggy Louisiana-style swamp at night, approaching a wooden boathouse and dock. The character walks along the dock past burning barrels to observe an NPC fishing by firelight, with atmospheric lighting from moonlight and flames reflecting off the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow swamp water path between vegetation banks

agents.ego_description: wading steadily through knee-deep swamp water toward distant lights

entered.detail: shallow murky water with lily pads covering the surface
tall swamp trees with Spanish moss silhouetted against night sky
tall grass and reeds lining the water path
dark night sky with visible stars and fog

segments.scene_description: The character wades through a narrow foggy swamp channel surrounded by dense vegetation and cypress trees. The water reflects the dim moonlight as the character moves steadily forward toward a distant building barely visible through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy bank leading to wooden dock structure

events.description: character exits shallow water onto grassy bank
warm orange firelight from barrels becomes visible as character approaches building

agents.ego_description: walking up the grassy slope from the water toward a wooden boathouse with a metal roll-up door

entered.detail: muddy grass slope leading up from the swamp water
weathered wooden building with garage door and small windows
elevated wooden plank walkway extending over the water
metal barrels with burning fires providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from water to land, walking up a grassy bank toward a rustic wooden boathouse. As the character steps onto the wooden dock, the scene lighting shifts from cool moonlight to warm firelight emanating from burning barrels near the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock with fire barrels and moored boat

events.description: fishing NPC comes into view sitting at the end of the dock
character slows and stops beside the fishing NPC to observe the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the dock past fire barrels to stand beside an NPC who is fishing, then stopping to look out at the swamp

notable_agents.action: sitting on a folding chair and fishing with a rod over the side of the dock

entered.detail: white motorboat moored alongside the dock
wooden posts with rope ties extending into the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the wooden dock past burning barrels, passing a small moored boat. Approaching a seated NPC who is fishing, the character slows and stops beside him, looking out over the foggy swamp water as the fisherman tends his line.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dim, foggy swamp that gradually transitions into a warm, firelit dockside scene. It begins with the character wading through a narrow channel of moonlit water surrounded by dense vegetation and cypress trees, moving steadily toward a distant building obscured by mist. As the character leaves the water and climbs a grassy bank, the cool moonlight gives way to the warm glow of burning barrels near a rustic wooden boathouse. The scene then shifts onto the wooden dock, passing a small moored boat and flickering flames before slowing to a stop beside a seated fisherman. Finally, the camera settles as the character looks out over the foggy swamp water while the fisherman tends his line.
